---
title: "从样地到结论：保护生物学数据实战"
subtitle: "基于 R 语言的生物实验设计与统计分析"
author: "管振华"
date: "2026"
---

```{=html}
<style>
.hero-cover {
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #e8f5e9 0%, #f1f8e9 30%, #e0f2f1 70%, #f3e5f5 100%);
  display: flex; flex-direction: column; justify-content: center; align-items: center;
  padding: 3rem 2rem; border-radius: 12px;
  margin: -1rem -1rem 2rem -1rem;
  border: 1px solid #c8e6c9;
}
.hero-cover h1 {
  font-size: clamp(1.8rem, 4vw, 3rem); font-weight: 900; letter-spacing: 0.04em;
  text-align: center; margin: 0 0 0.5rem 0; color: #2e7d32;
}
.hero-cover .sub { font-size: 1.05rem; color: #5d8a60; font-style: italic; margin-bottom: 0.8rem; text-align: center; }
.hero-cover .author { color: #888; font-size: 0.9rem; margin-bottom: 2rem; }
.kg-box {
  width: 100%; max-width: 850px; margin: 0 auto 2rem;
  background: #fff; border: 1px solid #c8e6c9;
  border-radius: 16px; padding: 1.5rem;
  box-shadow: 0 2px 12px rgba(46,125,50,0.06);
}
.kg-row { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 0.3rem; flex-wrap: wrap; margin: 0.3rem 0; }
.kg-core {
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #e8f5e9, #c8e6c9);
  border: 2px solid #4caf50; border-radius: 20px; padding: 0.5rem 1.6rem;
  font-weight: 800; font-size: 1rem; color: #2e7d32;
}
.kg-p {
  border-radius: 8px; padding: 0.3rem 0.7rem; font-size: 0.72rem; font-weight: 600; border: 1.5px solid;
}
.p1 { background: #e3f2fd; border-color: #90caf9; color: #1565c0; }
.p2 { background: #e8f5e9; border-color: #a5d6a7; color: #2e7d32; }
.p3 { background: #fff3e0; border-color: #ffcc80; color: #e65100; }
.p4 { background: #fce4ec; border-color: #f48fb1; color: #880e4f; }
.p5 { background: #ede7f6; border-color: #b39ddb; color: #4527a0; }
.kg-n {
  border-radius: 5px; padding: 0.15rem 0.45rem; font-size: 0.65rem; white-space: nowrap;
  border: 1px solid #ddd; background: #fafafa; color: #666;
}
.kg-a { color: #bbb; font-size: 0.6rem; }
.kg-line { height: 6px; border-left: 1px dashed #c8e6c9; margin: 0 auto; }
.start-btn {
  display: inline-block; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #4caf50, #2e7d32);
  color: #fff; border: none; padding: 0.6rem 1.8rem; border-radius: 30px;
  font-size: 0.9rem; font-weight: 700; text-decoration: none;
  box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(46,125,50,0.2);
}
.start-btn:hover { transform: translateY(-2px); box-shadow: 0 4px 16px rgba(46,125,50,0.3); }
</style>

<div class="hero-cover">
  <div style="font-size:2.5rem;margin-bottom:0.5rem;">🌲📊</div>
  <h1>从样地到结论</h1>
  <div class="sub">保护生物学数据实战 · 基于 R 语言</div>
  <div class="author">管振华 · 2026</div>

  <div class="kg-box">
    <div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:0.4rem;">
      <div class="kg-row"><div class="kg-core">🌳 保护生物学数据实战</div></div>
      <div class="kg-line"></div>
      <div class="kg-row"><div class="kg-p p1">第一篇：从保护问题进入统计</div></div>
      <div class="kg-row">
        <span class="kg-n">研究问题</span><span class="kg-a">→</span>
        <span class="kg-n">变量类型</span><span class="kg-a">→</span>
        <span class="kg-n">调查设计</span><span class="kg-a">→</span>
        <span class="kg-n">对照·重复·随机</span>
      </div>
      <div class="kg-line"></div>
      <div class="kg-row"><div class="kg-p p2">第二篇：看懂并整理保护数据</div></div>
      <div class="kg-row">
        <span class="kg-n">数据管理</span><span class="kg-a">→</span>
        <span class="kg-n">描述统计</span><span class="kg-a">→</span>
        <span class="kg-n">误差与不确定性</span><span class="kg-a">→</span>
        <span class="kg-n">📊 数据可视化</span>
      </div>
      <div class="kg-line"></div>
      <div class="kg-row"><div class="kg-p p3">第三篇：回答常见保护问题</div></div>
      <div class="kg-row">
        <span class="kg-n">t检验</span><span class="kg-a">·</span>
        <span class="kg-n">ANOVA</span><span class="kg-a">·</span>
        <span class="kg-n">卡方检验</span><span class="kg-a">·</span>
        <span class="kg-n">相关回归</span><span class="kg-a">→</span>
        <span class="kg-n">GLM</span>
      </div>
      <div class="kg-line"></div>
      <div class="kg-row"><div class="kg-p p4">第四篇：保护专业应用</div></div>
      <div class="kg-row">
        <span class="kg-n">🌲 森林保护</span><span class="kg-a">·</span>
        <span class="kg-n">🦉 野生动物</span><span class="kg-a">·</span>
        <span class="kg-n">🐛 生物多样性</span><span class="kg-a">·</span>
        <span class="kg-n">📋 措施评估</span><span class="kg-a">→</span>
        <span class="kg-n">🛡️ 保护行动</span>
      </div>
      <div class="kg-line"></div>
      <div class="kg-row"><div class="kg-p p5">第五篇：现代生态统计</div></div>
      <div class="kg-row">
        <span class="kg-n">混合模型</span><span class="kg-a">·</span>
        <span class="kg-n">贝叶斯统计</span><span class="kg-a">·</span>
        <span class="kg-n">时空分析</span><span class="kg-a">·</span>
        <span class="kg-n">🤖 AI学习</span>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <a href="chapters/01-role-of-statistics.html" class="start-btn">开始阅读 →</a>

  <div style="margin-top:1.2rem;color:#999;font-size:0.65rem;">
    野生动物保护 · 森林保护 · 植物保护 · 林学 · 生物多样性
  </div>
</div>
```

## 欢迎

本书是一本面向野生动物保护、森林保护、植物保护、林学与生物多样性专业学生的案例驱动统计教材。

### 这本书是什么

- **保护问题先行**：每章从一个真实的保护生物学问题出发
- **统计判断为核心**：重点不是背公式，而是"这个问题该用什么方法"
- **R 语言实操**：所有分析代码可运行、可复现
- **AI 辅助但不依赖**：教你用 AI 帮忙，同时教你检查 AI 的对错

### 如何使用

- **学生**：按章节顺序阅读，完成每章练习和 AI 核查任务
- **教师**：根据课时需求选取章节，每个案例可独立教学
- **保护工作者**：按专业方向或问题类型查找所需方法
